variants: Celina Ruas works at Riverstride Freight, where her expertise contributes to efficient logistics operations. She was born in Stoneknoll Commons and attended Quarrywind School of Medicine to build a solid foundation for her career. Outside of her professional responsibilities, Celina dedicates her time to the community as the Eco-Event Coordinator at Finchfall Park, encouraging sustainable practices among local residents. Additionally, her ability in Malay spelling enhances her interactions in diverse settings. Celina's multifaceted involvement demonstrates her commitment to both her work and the environment.
